summary: Phase 3.7f Testing Complete - Cookie-Management-System, Staging-Hinweise entfernt, Mobile-Header optimiert, Test-Logins verifiziert. All 13 backend tests passed. All frontend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Cookie Banner appears on first visit when no w2g_cookie_consent in localStorage
Cookie Banner shows 'Cookie-Einstellungen' title (DE) or 'Cookie Settings' (EN)
Cookie Banner has 3 action buttons: Accept All, Necessary Only, Show Details
Cookie Details Panel shows 2 categories: 'Technisch notwendig' (Always Active) and 'Funktional' (Toggle)
Accept All sets both necessary=true and functional=true in localStorage
Necessary Only sets necessary=true, functional=false
Confirm Selection respects the functional toggle state
Cookie Banner disappears after consent and does not reappear on subsequent visits
Cookie Banner is fully bilingual DE/EN based on i18n language
No [OFFEN], [HINWEIS], Go-Live warnings on /legal (Impressum) page
No [OFFEN], [HINWEIS], Go-Live warnings on /agb (AGB) page
No [OFFEN], [HINWEIS], Go-Live warnings on /privacy (Datenschutz) page
No [OFFEN] warnings on /portal/financials - shows 'in Vorbereitung' message
Privacy Policy Section 9 correctly describes Cookie-Management system with 2 categories
Mobile Header (390px): Logo, DE/EN switcher, Burger menu all visible
Mobile Header: Burger touch target >= 40px (40x40)
Mobile Menu: Shows nav links, Login, Apply button correctly
Desktop Header: Logo, Nav links, DE/EN switcher, Login, Apply button all visible
Admin login works (admin@studienkolleg-aachen.de / Admin@2026!) - redirects to /staff
Staff login works (staff@studienkolleg-aachen.de / DevSeed@2026!) - redirects to /staff
Teacher login works (teacher@studienkolleg-aachen.de / DevSeed@2026!) - redirects to /staff
Applicant login works (applicant@studienkolleg-aachen.de / DevSeed@2026!) - redirects to /portal
Notification Bell visible in Staff Layout (top-right corner)
Notification Bell visible in Applicant Layout (top-right corner)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3.7f complete. Cookie Banner with localStorage key 'w2g_cookie_consent' working correctly. All legal pages clean of staging warnings. Mobile header optimized with min-[420px] breakpoint for logo text. All 4 role logins verified with correct redirects. Notification bell visible in both Staff and Applicant layouts.

Backend: Applicant login returns applicant role

Backend: Applicant can access /api/auth/me

Backend: Staff can access notifications

Frontend: Cookie banner has Accept All button
Frontend: Cookie banner has Necessary Only button
Frontend: Cookie banner has Details toggle
Frontend: Cookie details panel shows 2 categories
Frontend: Technisch notwendig category shows 'Always Active'
Frontend: Funktional category has toggle

Frontend: Necessary Only sets necessary=true, functional=false

Frontend: Cookie banner disappears after consent

Frontend: Cookie banner DE language texts correct
Frontend: Cookie banner EN language texts correct
Frontend: /legal page has no [OFFEN], [HINWEIS], Go-Live warnings
Frontend: /agb page has no [OFFEN], [HINWEIS], Go-Live warnings
Frontend: /privacy page has no [OFFEN], [HINWEIS], Go-Live warnings
Frontend: /privacy Section 9 describes Cookie-Management correctly

Frontend: /portal/financials shows 'in Vorbereitung' message
Frontend: Mobile header (390px) - Logo visible

Frontend: Mobile header (390px) - Burger menu visible
